title: Structuring the ReAct Prompt
concept: Designing the system instructions that force the model to output Thought-Action-Observation turns.

exercises.prompt: What is the main goal of the Agent Project we are working on?

options.text: To create a chatbot for socializing
To develop an agent that fixes code errors

exercises.explain: The main goal is to develop an agent that can parse code errors and write fixes.

cards.title: What is a ReAct Prompt?
cards.body: A ReAct prompt helps the AI make decisions by telling it to think, act, and then observe the result.

cards.title: Defining the ReAct Structure
cards.body: The ReAct structure consists of three parts: Thought (what to think), Action (what to do), and Observation (what to look for next).

cards.title: Building a House
cards.body: Designing a ReAct prompt is like planning a house: you need a clear blueprint (instructions) to know where each room (response) goes.

cards.title: Sample ReAct Prompt
cards.body: An example could be: 'Think about the code error, decide what fix to make, then check if the fix worked.'

cards.title: Myth: Simple Instructions Work
cards.body: Some believe simple instructions are sufficient, but detailed prompts create more effective AI behavior.

cards.title: Visualizing ReAct
cards.body: Think of the ReAct loop as a cycle of thinking, acting, and checking.

left.text: What do I think about the code?

right.text: How did my action change the outcome?

exercises.prompt: What is the first part of the ReAct structure?
exercises.explain: The first part is Thought, where the AI considers what is going on before taking action.

exercises.prompt: The ReAct structure includes only action and observation.
exercises.explain: False. The ReAct structure includes Thought, Action, and Observation.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence: A ReAct prompt includes Thought, ______, and Observation.
exercises.sentence: A ReAct prompt includes Thought, Action, and Observation.
exercises.explain: The correct answer is Action, as it's the central part of the ReAct structure.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is a critical element of the ReAct prompt?

options.text: Looking at the result after taking action

exercises.explain: The correct answer combines all three elements, which makes the ReAct prompt effective.

exercises.prompt: What are the three parts of the ReAct structure?
exercises.explain: The correct answer is Thought, Action, and Observation. These three parts work together to guide the AI through problem-solving effectively.
